name: Fairies
teaser: Play cards with a choice between two effects and mess with other players' non-standard actions, especially play-on-minion actions.
mechanics: Play cards with a choice between two effects and mess with other players' non-standard actions, especially play-on-minion actions.

name: Kitty Cats
teaser: Weaken other players' minions, temporarily take control of weak minions, and destroy your own minions for effects, whether minions you played or minions you took control of.
mechanics: Weaken other players' minions, temporarily take control of weak minions, and destroy your own minions for effects, whether minions you played or minions you took control of.

name: Mythic Horses
teaser: Gain benefits for playing or simply having minions on the same base as another one of your minions.
mechanics: Gain benefits for playing or simply having minions on the same base as another one of your minions.

name: Princesses
teaser: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a cast of six power-5 minions with useful abilities, and support your deck with movement, card draw and minion retrieval.
mechanics: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a cast of six power-5 minions with useful abilities, and support your deck with movement, card draw and minion retrieval.
